params.name: Aeneid
params.description:
On Oct 5, 23 BC, Octavian asked Virgil for the book to read
The Aeneid is a Latin epic poem written by Virgil that tells the legendary story of Aeneas, a Trojan who fled the fall of Troy and traveled to Italy after encountering plagues, evil waves, and monsters, where he became the ancestor of the Romans with the help of the gods. Because it was composed and preserved in writing rather than orally, the text exhibits less variation than other classical epics. The Aeneid is widely regarded as V …
